notes: All 4 phase-1 tasks (mxdx-awe.5 through mxdx-awe.8) executed and closed on branch brains/rust-p2p-interactive. T-10 (mxdx-awe.5): added Megolm<T> and Bytes in crates/mxdx-matrix/src/crypto_envelope.rs with pub(crate) constructor, plus MatrixClient::encrypt_for_room and MatrixClient::send_megolm (fallback path posts through room.send_raw per ADR 2026-04-15-megolm-bytes-newtype.md 2026-04-16 addendum = Option B semantic equivalence); SealedKey in crates/mxdx-p2p/src/crypto.rs with pub(in crate::crypto) constructor, Drop-zeroized. T-11 (mxdx-awe.6): P2PCrypto AES-256-GCM with random 96-bit IV from OsRng per frame; EncryptedFrame JSON {c,iv} padded-base64 matching packages/core/p2p-crypto.js; 11 unit tests (roundtrip empty/1B/UTF-8/64KB, wire shape, tag mismatch, wrong key, IV uniqueness, invalid IV len, invalid b64, deterministic helper). T-12 (mxdx-awe.7): 5-vector fixture at crates/mxdx-p2p/tests/fixtures/crypto-vectors.json (empty, 1B, 1KB, 64KB, framing-pitfall with literal "c":); Rust decrypt test gated on feature vector-gen; Node sidecar at packages/e2e-tests/tests/rust-npm-crypto-vectors.test.js (1 passed); regenerator script at packages/e2e-tests/scripts/regenerate-p2p-vectors.mjs is idempotent. T-13 (mxdx-awe.8, P0): trybuild = "1" added to both crates' dev-deps; compile-fail fixtures + committed .stderr goldens; self-test performed (temporarily widened both constructors to pub, confirmed both trybuild tests FAILED, reverted, confirmed they PASS again) — evidence the enforcement is real not vacuous, documented in commit 3da94c8. Secure review hardening (commit 6f8544e): enabled aes-gcm zeroize feature so Aes256Gcm internal ghash_key zeroizes on drop; strengthened Megolm<T> doc to make Option B plaintext-inner-bytes explicit (callers must forward bytes only to send_megolm or P2PTransport::try_send). Follow-up bead mxdx-2oi filed (P2, phase-5) documenting send_megolm(room_id, event_type, Megolm<Bytes>) signature refinement vs storm spec §3.2. Security grep gate (scripts/check-no-unencrypted-sends.sh) green. cargo check --workspace --exclude mxdx-core-wasm green; cargo check -p mxdx-p2p --target wasm32-unknown-unknown green. Pre-existing mxdx-types::keychain_chain test failure unrelated — filtered out. Commits: 1f0cc6e (T-10), ea4cc2e (T-11), d7ddee5 (T-12), 3da94c8 (T-13), 6f8544e (secure). Phase 1 complete; phase 2 (TURN credentials) and subsequent phases can depend on stable Megolm<Bytes>, SealedKey, P2PCrypto, and EncryptedFrame types.
